title: ACADIA Pharmaceuticals Inc (ACAD) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Revenue Growth and Strategic Pipeline Expansion
text: ACADIA Pharmaceuticals reported Q4 2024 earnings with record revenue growth. Fourth quarter 2024 total revenues were $259.6 million, up 12% year-over-year. Full year 2024 revenues totaled $957.8 million, representing 32% year-over-year growth. DAYBUE recorded record quarterly revenues of $109.6 million, up 97% year-over-year. NUPLAZID net sales were $174.4 million, up 8% year-over-year. Net income for Q4 2024 was $27.1 million, or $0.17 per diluted share. The company achieved over $1 billion in combined 2024 revenues for DAYBUE and NUPLAZID. Full-year 2025 guidance: Total revenues $1.03-$1.095 billion. NUPLAZID sales $650-$690 million. Daybue U.S. sales $380-$405 million. The company completed the sale of a Rare Pediatric Disease Priority Review Voucher for $150 million, strengthening balance sheet to $756 million in cash.
